title: Some nitpicky things about instrumentality
wikitext:
[]: Some nitpicky things about instrumentality             Quote Post by Cesternino53 » Wed Dec 06, 2006 6:24 pm Soooo not sure if this has been brought up before, but why does Keel MELT during complementation, while the rest seem to pop? Is it because of his cyborg-awesomness? Also, Aoba Hyuga, and Kouzo seem to pop completely while Maya's hand doesn't pop for some reason. Probably just dramatic effect, but any theroies?

[]:             Quote Post by directedition » Wed Dec 06, 2006 6:40 pm I'm going to say there's nothing behind it. Though if forced to, I'd say the air pressure in KEEL's room was greater and Rei was poking people with needles.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 06, 2006 9:00 pm perhaps the amount of body mass was too little for a "sploosh", which perhaps is caused by the near instantaneous change of density from body mass to LCL. Keel had lots of stuff that wasn't turned into LCL, therefore, not much of a "sploosh" waahoo! What's more interesting is that there was no ATF Blur prior to his tangification

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Dec 06, 2006 11:53 pm Ornette wrote: What's more interesting is that there was no ATF Blur prior to his tangification.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Thu Dec 07, 2006 1:14 am Ornette wrote: perhaps the amount of body mass was too little for a "sploosh", which perhaps is caused by the near instantaneous change of density from body mass to LCL. Keel had lots of stuff that wasn't turned into LCL, therefore, not much of a "sploosh"

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Dec 07, 2006 9:34 am AuthenticM wrote: Or because it was cooler that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Mort_Cinder » Thu Dec 28, 2006 7:29 am not sure i should have made a new thread or not but the title of this thread fits my questions quite well. i just watched EoE and have a couple of questions: 1) SEELE say they wanted 3I because mankind reached its evolutionary dead end and so everyone will be joined as one being. Is this being LCL? isnt LCL the primordial soup, from where all life originated in the first place? then after 3I wouldnt life start evolving all over again, first cells, then plants, then animals then humans, and so after so many years after 3I mankind will reach the evolutionary dead end again and so SEELE plan was pointless? 2) A Seed of Life included the Spear of Longinus so that the SoL will do what the FAR wanted. Adam had a Spear which after 2I was retrieved by NERV. Where is the Spear that should have been in the black moon then? 3) At the end of EoE we see Yui in space with the Spear. Was this to stop someone like SEELE from making another 3I in the future? or did she basically become a Seed of Life herself and would start life somewhere else in the universe? or maybe both? Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Dec 28, 2006 8:17 am Mort_Cinder wrote: 1) SEELE say they wanted 3I because mankind reached its evolutionary dead end and so everyone will be joined as one being. Is this being LCL? isnt LCL the primordial soup, from where all life originated in the first place? then after 3I wouldnt life start evolving all over again, first cells, then plants, then animals then humans, and so after so many years after 3I mankind will reach the evolutionary dead end again and so SEELE plan was pointless?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Dec 28, 2006 10:43 am Mort_Cinder wrote: 2) A Seed of Life included the Spear of Longinus so that the SoL will do what the FAR wanted.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Dec 28, 2006 10:47 am Those are both popular theories. There's aren't that many other reasons Yui would float around "very lonely" in space for eternity.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 28, 2006 12:12 pm Mort_Cinder wrote: 3) At the end of EoE we see Yui in space with the Spear. Was this to stop someone like SEELE from making another 3I in the future? or did she basically become a Seed of Life herself and would start life somewhere else in the universe? or maybe both?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 29, 2006 3:29 pm DURR HURR YUI IS JUST GONNA BE A MONUMENT AND FLOAT AROUND UNTIL THE UNIVERSE IMPLODES A DURR HURR NOTHING MORE NOTHING LESS. Damn you, MaggotMaster.
